effects.effect: Target a Vivosaur your Opponent controls; apply Poison to that Vivosaur.

effects.name: Back from the Dead
effects.effect: During the End Phase, if a Vivosaur takes Poison damage and this card is in your discard pile: You can Charge this Vivosaur. You can only use Back from the Dead once per turn.

effects.name: Poison Assault
effects.effect: Apply Poison to the defending Vivosaur.
